column1: (1) IRC is calculated once per week.
(2) IRC-based RWA is calculated using the greater of the mean and period end IRC charge (see table 23.1 below).
(3) IRC RWA is IRC times 12.5 plus $128 million add-on for RNIM. IRC RWA (equivalent of $10 million capital).
Immaterial differences in calculation above may exist due to rounding.
